MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management, is present. Represented by Maura Grevel.
Attorney, John Zanghi, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Gary Emswiler, is present.
Attorney, Frederick Herold , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-06-2010 is vacated.
